description: Phase 43 scan_measurement_boundary_manifest: config/measurement_boundary.json (R24+30 axis D manifest) must exist with required top-level keys {schema, boundary_principle, measurement_atoms, boundary_policy, adapter_design_notes}, at least 1 measurement atom, and every atom carrying {value, atlas_ref, nature} fields. Parallels P36 (invariants) and P42 (silicon). Gate: healthy == true.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_measurement_boundary_manifest.json ] && jq -r "if .healthy == true then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_measurement_boundary_manifest.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
